Animals & Nature.name: Lion
Animals & Nature.hint: The King of the Jungle with a big mane.

Animals & Nature.name: Elephant
Animals & Nature.hint: Large ears and a very long trunk.

Animals & Nature.name: Giraffe
Animals & Nature.hint: Has a very long neck to eat leaves from tall trees.

Animals & Nature.name: Unicorn
Animals & Nature.hint: A mythical horse with a horn on its head.

Animals & Nature.name: Penguin
Animals & Nature.hint: A flightless bird that lives in the cold.

Animals & Nature.name: T-Rex
Animals & Nature.hint: A giant dinosaur with tiny arms.

Animals & Nature.name: Octopus
Animals & Nature.hint: Has eight arms and lives in the ocean.

Animals & Nature.name: Butterfly
Animals & Nature.hint: Starts its life as a caterpillar.

Animals & Nature.name: Shark
Animals & Nature.hint: The most famous predator in the ocean.

Animals & Nature.name: Sloth
Animals & Nature.hint: The slowest animal in the world.

Animals & Nature.name: Owl
Animals & Nature.hint: A wise bird that stays up at night.

Animals & Nature.name: Cactus
Animals & Nature.hint: A prickly plant that lives in the desert.

Animals & Nature.name: Volcano
Animals & Nature.hint: A mountain that shoots out hot lava.

Animals & Nature.name: Rainbow
Animals & Nature.hint: Appears in the sky after it rains.
